description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a combination of white and reddish-brown wall panels, large glass windows, and multiple balconies and terraces. The house includes an outdoor swimming pool, a paved driveway with parked cars, and landscaped surroundings with several types of trees. The main entrance is recessed beneath a covered area, and the upper floors have open terraces with outdoor furniture. The overall structure is boxy and minimalist, emphasizing straight lines and open spaces. The property is surrounded by a mix of greenery and hardscape, creating a contemporary urban residence.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large windows, balconies, a pool, and landscaped surroundings. The design is minimalist with white and reddish-brown panels and open terraces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the house's flat roof, large windows, and adjacent trees, with the pool partially visible.
description_view_1: Front angle highlighting the main entryway, outdoor dining area, and the pool prominently in the foreground.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the driveway with two parked cars, a large terrace, and the pool to the left.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the garage doors, driveway, and a clear view of the upper balcony and trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, wide glass door, and a covered porch area
